title: Decorative Gateways
description: Place decorative non-functional End Gateways at the cost of 1 Ender Pearl. Versions 3.3+ contains an optional resource pack.
body:
<font color="yellow">**Click on versions for Optional Resource Pack! (Included in Version 3.3+)**</font>
![Banner V2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90a361b1f29d85979cb8d1244fb06920666cc1ca.png)

# Info
Craft the Decorative Gateway Tool with End Rod and Ender Pearl. This will allow you to right click to place or remove non-functional decorative End Gateways

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0768ebc315db15296ea40be444984b0aa23e9a8.png)

# Placement Requirements
The tool can't be used in The End, this is because Gateway blocks in The End will teleport you, even if they don't have coordinates set to them.

Placing cost 1 Ender Pearl which is refunded if you remove it. Placing a Gateway block follows the same block placement conditions as other blocks.

# Optional Advancment Guides
To enable a list with guides for my datapacks, use `/advancement grant <targets> from dragon3025:root`.
